kicker: ET LEVEL I // TEST FREQUENCY SELECTION

beats.narration: Frequency, drive, gain, filtering — every eddy current technique fixes all four. But frequency comes first, because it alone changes the physics inside the part.

payload.title: TEST FREQUENCY SELECTION
payload.sub: The one setting that changes what happens inside the metal.

beats.narration: Frequency sets the depth window. Standard depth shrinks as one over the square root of frequency, and detection ends near three standard depths.
Place the deepest flaw you must find inside that window, ideally near one standard depth. Gain cannot create current where none flows.

payload.heading: Aim the window at the flaw

beats.narration: Frequency also sets phase, spreading flaw depths apart and separating lift-off from flaws. Surface work runs high; subsurface and layered work runs low.

payload.heading: High for surface, low for depth

chips.s: Hundreds of kHz to a few MHz

beats.narration: So select for the flaw the procedure names, prove the response on the reference standard, and never change frequency without re-standardizing.

payload.sub: Change frequency and standardization is void — re-standardize first.
